name: AIToolsForLawyers
headline: Curated directory of AI tools for legal professionals
subheadline: Save research time; avoid risky tools. Built for lawyers, paralegals, legal ops.
painPoint: Hard to find vetted, safe AI tools.
solution: Curated directory of AI tools for legal professionals.

cta.label: Submit a listing
cta.note: Free submissions reviewed weekly. Featured slots paid.

items.name: Harvey
items.blurb: AI platform built for law firms that assists with drafting, research, and document analysis.

items.name: CoCounsel by Casetext
items.blurb: Thomson Reuters AI legal assistant for case research, document review, and deposition prep.

items.name: Spellbook
items.blurb: AI contract drafting and review tool that works inside Microsoft Word using GPT-4.

items.name: Lexis+ AI
items.blurb: LexisNexis AI assistant with conversational legal research grounded in its proprietary database.

items.name: Westlaw AI
items.blurb: Thomson Reuters AI features within Westlaw for faster case law research and brief summarization.

items.name: Luminance
items.blurb: AI platform for legal document review and due diligence used by law firms and corporates.

items.name: Ironclad
items.blurb: Contract lifecycle management platform with AI-assisted redlining, approvals, and analytics.

items.name: Juro
items.blurb: Browser-native contract management platform with AI drafting and workflow automation.

items.name: Clearbrief
items.blurb: AI tool that verifies legal citations in briefs and links factual claims to supporting documents.

items.name: Briefpoint
items.blurb: Automates drafting of discovery responses and objections from uploaded opposition documents.

items.name: EvenUp
items.blurb: AI-generated demand letters for plaintiff personal injury cases using medical records and evidence.

items.name: Diligen
items.blurb: AI contract review tool for due diligence that extracts and categorizes key clauses at scale.

items.name: Kira Systems
items.blurb: Machine learning contract analysis software used for due diligence and contract management.

items.name: Clio
items.blurb: Cloud-based practice management suite with AI features for time tracking, billing, and intake.

items.name: MyCase
items.blurb: Legal practice management software with an AI assistant for drafting and case management tasks.

directory.sponsorNote: Get featured at the top of this list.

seoTitle: AIToolsForLawyers — Curated directory of AI tools for legal…
seoDescription: Curated directory of AI tools for legal professionals. Built for lawyers, paralegals, legal ops. Free to use.

faq.a: Lawyers, paralegals, legal ops. If that's you and "hard to find vetted, safe ai tools" sounds familiar, this was built for your exact situation.

faq.q: Why would I pay for this?
faq.a: Save research time; avoid risky tools.

faq.q: How fast do I get it?
faq.a: Right now — everything on this page works immediately, free.

validationMetric: Index + 200 visits; target 1 paid/featured listing or 3 affiliate clicks in 14 days
deploymentTarget: Vercel (static) — primary; Cloudflare Pages / Netlify alternates
killCriteria: <150 visits AND 0 listing/affiliate revenue interest after 14 days
biggestRisk: Cold-start (needs both content and traffic); affiliate payouts are thin early
first10: Seed great entries, then tell each listed brand they're featured (warm outreach for upgrades)
